ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Setback_Distance_ft__c)), Setback_Distance_ft__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Structural_Load_Limit_psf__c)), Structural_Load_Limit_psf__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Parapet_Height_in__c)), Parapet_Height_in__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Parapet_Width_in__c)), Parapet_Width_in__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Point_Load_Limit_psf__c)), Point_Load_Limit_psf__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Maximum_System_Weight_Limit_lbs__c)),Maximum_System_Weight_Limit_lbs__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Ground_Slope__c)), Ground_Slope__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Array_Azimuth__c)), Array_Azimuth__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Module_Length_mm__c)), Module_Length_mm__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Module_Width_mm__c)), Module_Width_mm__c <= 0), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Module_Weight_lbs__c)), Module_Weight_lbs__c <= 0) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field must be greater than 0. Leave blank if not applicable.
